|  24 |          +- [Input] KeyRangeAccumulator <Row>                               |
|  25 |          |  +- Batch Scan on $v2 <Row> (scan_method: Row)                   |
|  29 |          +- [Map] Local Distributed Union <Row>                             |

| *31 |                +- Table Scan on Albums <Row> (scan_method: Row)             |

Node Parameters(identified by ID):
  0: Split Range: (STARTS_WITH($AlbumTitle, 'T') AND ($AlbumTitle LIKE 'T%e'))
  1: Split Range: (($SingerId' = $SingerId) AND ($AlbumId' = $AlbumId))
  2: $v2.Batch=$v1
  4: $v1.AlbumId=$AlbumId, $v1.AlbumTitle=$AlbumTitle, $v1.SingerId=$SingerId
  5: Residual Condition: ($AlbumTitle LIKE 'T%e')
  6: $AlbumId=AlbumId, $AlbumTitle=AlbumTitle, $SingerId=SingerId
     Seek Condition: STARTS_WITH($AlbumTitle, 'T')
 22: $batched_SingerId, $batched_AlbumId, $batched_AlbumTitle, $MarketingBudget
 25: $batched_AlbumId=AlbumId, $batched_AlbumTitle=AlbumTitle, $batched_SingerId=SingerId
 31: $MarketingBudget=MarketingBudget, $SingerId'=SingerId, $AlbumId'=AlbumId
     Seek Condition: (($SingerId' = $batched_SingerId) AND ($AlbumId' = $batched_AlbumId))
